string 2:
Oh! You remember me? Me used to be Kamemon.
We went Shellmon house together.
Me make big find! But now stuck here...

This, Titan trap! Them up to no good. Them stay here long
time.
{next}How can I get you out?
{next}What's this "big find"?
{next}So, how've you been?
Me think hard, look all over cell, but no way out.
No can show. Stuck in here. But me find big vein.

What you think...?! Wait. Sorry. Long time, no see. But me
not good.
Me want go free, but cell too strong. No can break.

This cell, very hard rock. Same as rock nearby. Big hits
can't break.
Even strong arm can't break. Only hope is...
{next}The king of the sea?
{next}To unlock the door?
{next}Hang on. Let me give it a whack!
Yes... maybe. King of sea very strong. Maybe king can break.

Me find keyhole, but key not here. And keyhole filled in. No
good.
S-Stop! You just get hurt! Hand break.

Chrondigizoit ore vein, not far. Maybe before, this cell
keep ore safe.
King of sea can maybe break cell. But king no come for me.
Me talk before, but nobody listen! No use.
{next}I'll bring the king here.
{next}What happened before?
{end}I'll think how to save you and come back.
King no come. King not care. Just like before.
Me tell everybody, water bad. Me want to help! But no good.
Thinking no use... But me thank you!
You think how to help? Me no believe... Still, me hope!
{next}I got this.
{end}Not yet...

Me trust in you! You not like others. You not like new king
of sea.

See? This problem tough. But if you think of way, you tell
me!
Me tell them over and over. But nobody listen.
Nobody believe me. So new king of sea no help.

You still want to meet new king of sea? It no good. But
trying not bad.

What is it? You seem upset. ...What? Someone is trapped in
an impact-resistant cell?

I had no idea such a thing even existed. You remember where
it is, right? Show me the way!

I shall crack open that cell as if it were dead coral! Let
us set out at once!

Well? Are you ready to rescue that trapped Digimon? I need
you to show me the way.
{next}Let's go.
{end}No, not yet.
Then let us be off!

I see... Then I suppose the matter must wait. But, please,
come back as quickly as you can!
Ah, there you are. Come. Let us set out at once.
{next}All right.
{end}I need a little more time to prepare.
Please, take me to where JumboGamemon has been trapped.

Very well, then. I shall wait for you here. Let me know as
soon as you are prepared.
Suspend the rescue of JumboGamemon and leave the area?
Suspend the rescue.
{end}Continue with the rescue.

What? Urgent business calls you away? Very well. See me at
my throne when you are done.
We had best proceed with all haste.
You back?! And with you... No! You really bring...?

Please accept my apologies for not coming sooner. You must
have been in great distress.
New... king of sea?

Hmm... This cell is sturdy indeed. Yet even these walls are
no match for my strength.
Back away, now... Yaaah!
Whoa! Me... Me not believe it! Just one blow...!

Excellent. That went just as I hoped. JumboGamemon, are you
unhurt?
JumboGamemon... just fine.

So, there is a vein of Chrondigizoit ore here! And you
found it, did you? Well done!

But you must be exhausted. Please, come with me. I shall
make up for all the worry—
M-Me not go with you!
Me thank you for breaking cell. But me still not trust you!

So... you feel betrayed. That, too, is my fault. If only I
knew what happened sooner.
I am sorry.

I know from experience how easy it is to lose faith in
others when you have been abandoned.

So, I promise you, upon the sea, I will never let you go
through anything like that again.
You... promise?

Yes, and I invite you to come live in the Abyss Sanctuary. I
would welcome you there.
Well... if you invite me... maybe me try it out.

Now, JumboGamemon's rescue and the discovery of a 
Chrondigizoit vein are thanks to you.

That means I can repair my armor whenever I wish, though it
does not get damaged often.

In any case, please accept this token of my appreciation.
Oh, and come see me any time.
Hi! You doing well? Me living here now.
Me still not sure of new king of sea, but seem nice.
N-Not that me done testing yet!

Where are you going? I need you to show me where that
Digimon is trapped in a cell!
